name: Vegetable Stock
recipeIngredient: 3 potatoes, chopped (Note: Not peeling them but can if desired)
1 leek, both green and white parts chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute' onion and leek in a little water until tender.
2. Add all ingredients to the water.
3. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 2 to 3 hours.
